# 9Router

Updated: 2026-06-12
Canonical: https://9router.space/
Support: support@aigeamy.com

## Summary
9Router is a LLM router and model gateway for teams routing prompts across model providers, fallback paths, and agent workflows. It helps users get a model routing decision page with LLM router examples, pricing, and operational safety notes.

## Core pages
- Home: https://9router.space/
- Pricing: https://9router.space/pricing/
- Checkout fallback: https://9router.space/checkout/
- Privacy: https://9router.space/privacy/
- Terms: https://9router.space/terms/

## Traffic intent pages
- LLM router: https://9router.space/llm-router/ - LLM Router Guide for 9Router

## Pricing anchors
- Starter: $19/mo public planning anchor
- Team: $69/mo public planning anchor
- Scale: $199/mo public planning anchor
